name: Agrucapers
description: Agrucapers is a leading manufacturer and distributor of capers, highlighting their expertise in producing this distinctive flower bud that adds unique flavor to Mediterranean cuisine. With over 50 years of experience, the company emphasizes the nutritional benefits of capers, including their antioxidant properties and low-calorie content, making them an ideal choice for healthy diets.

name: Flores El Capiro S.A.
description: Capiro is a Colombian manufacturer that specializes in the cultivation and commercialization of high-quality chrysanthemums, including a variety of pompons.

name: Capers Catering
description: Capers Catering is a specialized service provider that focuses on bespoke, sustainable catering, offering a farm-to-table approach with seasonal menus made from locally sourced and organic ingredients. Their commitment to customized culinary experiences and meticulous service ensures that every event, whether corporate or private, features fresh, visually stunning dishes.

name: CAPERS
description: CAPERS® is a provider of integrated law enforcement and public safety software solutions, offering various products such as Computer-Aided Dispatch and Records Management Systems. Their software is designed for flexibility and ease of use, catering to agencies of all sizes.

name: Capsule
description: Capsule is a technology-driven pharmacy that offers a seamless experience for patients by accepting various insurance plans and providing tailored prescription delivery. The company's innovative approach allows doctors to send prescriptions directly to their platform, enhancing personalized healthcare outcomes.

name: Capers Restaurant
description: Capers is a renowned provider of gourmet food and dining experiences, offering a diverse selection of fresh, ethically-sourced seafood and premium aged steaks. Their commitment to quality is reflected in their award-winning team and a Wine Spectator recognized wine menu, making it a notable destination for food and wine enthusiasts.

name: EuroCaps Ltd
description: EuroCaps specializes in the manufacture of softgel capsules and nutritional gummies, offering a diverse range of products, including vegetarian and complex softgel formulations. The company's state-of-the-art facility and commitment to quality ensure high standards in production, making them leaders in the nutritional supplement market.

name: Gruppo Cap
description: The CAP Group specializes in integrated water services, including purification and transportation, with a strong commitment to sustainability and efficient resource management. Their focus on transparency and innovative solutions ensures the delivery of high-quality water to the Milan Metropolitan area and surrounding regions.

name: eCAPS Cybersecurity & Networking
description: Caps is a prominent distributor in the IT industry, offering a wide range of products and solutions, particularly in networking and cybersecurity. With a strong focus on enterprise-class products and partnerships with leading brands like Kaspersky and SonicWall, the company ensures comprehensive support for security and networking needs.

name: Capsag Consulting Services (Singapore India UK USA)
description: Capsag is a comprehensive Human Resource Management and Training solution provider that offers services such as recruitment and corporate training, with a focus on IT and emerging technologies. The company supports various industries, helping businesses connect with top talent and address HR challenges effectively.
